hero.title: XLSX to ODS
hero.subtitle: Export Excel files to ODS for OpenOffice/LibreOffice.

features.title: Export to ODF
features.text: Create ODS files compatible with OpenOffice/LibreOffice.

about_formats: XLSX is Excel's native workbook format.
ODS is the OpenDocument Spreadsheet format for LibreOffice and OpenOffice.
tips: Save a copy before converting complex workbooks

faq.question: Will macros be preserved?
faq.answer: Macros are not preserved when converting to ODS.
